TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Yuwhbun_raka, title = Yuwhbun_raka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yuwhbun_raka} }

S.FORM: alang Yuwhbun raka ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 117 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 105 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yuwhbun raka raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga Sqiy. tay 'llaw na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga Kayway. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Yuwhbun raka ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 117 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 105 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yuwhbun raka raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga Sqiy. tay 'llaw na Yuwhbun raka hya' ga Kayway. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ juwħβun raka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na juwħβun raka raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na juwħβun raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na juwħβun raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na juwħβun raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na juwħβun raka ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕqij. taj ʔllaw na juwħβun raka ħjaʔ ɣa kajwaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
